skill.name: elevenlabs-tts
skill.description: ElevenLabs text-to-speech with 22+ premium voices, multilingual support, and voice tuning via inference.sh CLI. Models: eleven_multilingual_v2 (highest quality), eleven_turbo_v2_5 (low latency), eleven_flash_v2_5 (ultra-fast). Capabilities: text-to-speech, voice selection, stability/style control, 32 languages. Use for: voiceovers, audiobooks, video narration, podcasts, accessibility, IVR. Triggers: elevenlabs, eleven labs, elevenlabs tts, premium tts, professional voice, ai voice, high quality tts, multilingual tts, eleven labs voice, voice generation, natural speech, realistic voice, voice over, speech synthesis
skill.summary: Premium text-to-speech with 22+ ElevenLabs voices, multilingual support, and voice tuning via inference.sh CLI.
skill.author: inferen-sh

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer incorrectly flagged markdown documentation as security risks. All 52 external_commands findings are markdown code blocks (backticks), not shell execution. All 4 network findings are documentation URLs, not runtime network calls. The 2 high-risk crypto findings are false positives on description text. The skill uses allowed-tools: Bash(infsh *) which is a properly restricted CLI wrapper for the official inference.sh platform. No executable code or security vulnerabilities present.

risk_factor_evidence.reasoning: Markdown code blocks showing CLI examples, not executable code
Documentation links and example URLs, not runtime network calls

content.user_title: Generate professional voiceovers with ElevenLabs TTS
content.value_statement: Create natural-sounding speech in 32 languages with 22+ premium AI voices. Perfect for voiceovers, audiobooks, podcasts, and accessibility without expensive recording equipment.
actual_capabilities: Generate speech in 32 languages with eleven_multilingual_v2 model
Choose from 22+ premium voices with different styles and accents
Fine-tune voice characteristics using stability, similarity_boost, and style parameters
Output audio in multiple formats (MP3, PCM) with various quality settings
Support for low-latency models (eleven_flash_v2_5) for real-time applications
Integrate with video generation tools for talking head workflows
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI installation and authentication
API usage subject to ElevenLabs rate limits and credit consumption
Voice cloning requires separate setup and ethical considerations
Audio quality depends on input text length and complexity

use_cases.title: Content Creator Voiceovers
use_cases.description: Generate professional voiceovers for YouTube videos, product demos, and social media content without hiring voice actors.

use_cases.title: Audiobook Narration
use_cases.description: Convert written content into audiobooks with consistent, natural-sounding narration across multiple chapters.

use_cases.title: Multilingual E-Learning
use_cases.description: Create course narration in multiple languages from a single script, enabling global accessibility.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Speech Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate speech from this text: "[Your text here]" using a warm female American voice.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick voiceover for a short announcement

prompt_templates.title: Professional Presentation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a professional voiceover for my presentation script using a British male voice with authoritative tone. Text: "[Presentation content]"

prompt_templates.title: Multilingual Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate speech in Spanish using the multilingual model for this text: "[Spanish text]". Use highest quality settings.

prompt_templates.title: Voice + Video Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: First generate a voiceover with an American female voice for: "[Script]". Then create a talking head video using the generated audio with this portrait image: [image URL].

output_examples.input: Generate speech: "Welcome to our product demo" with voice aria
output_examples.output: Audio file (MP3, 44.1kHz) containing natural-sounding speech with warm American female voice, ready for playback or download

output_examples.input: Create Spanish narration: "Bienvenidos a nuestra empresa" using eleven_multilingual_v2
output_examples.output: High-quality Spanish audio with authentic pronunciation and natural intonation, suitable for professional use

best_practices: Use appropriate model for your use case: multilingual_v2 for quality, flash_v2_5 for speed
Adjust stability and style parameters to match your content tone - lower stability for expressive content
Preview with short samples before generating long content to verify voice and settings
anti_patterns: Do not use for generating deceptive content, deepfakes, or impersonating real individuals without consent
Avoid extremely long single requests - break into segments for better quality and error handling
Do not rely solely on AI voices for critical accessibility without human review

faq.question: What is the inference.sh CLI and how do I install it?
faq.answer: The inference.sh CLI is the official command-line interface for accessing AI services. Install it following the instructions at the inference.sh documentation. Run 'infsh login' to authenticate before using this skill.

faq.question: Which ElevenLabs model should I choose?
faq.answer: Use eleven_multilingual_v2 for highest quality and multilingual support, eleven_turbo_v2_5 for balanced speed and quality, or eleven_flash_v2_5 for ultra-low latency real-time applications.

faq.question: How do I control the voice characteristics?
faq.answer: Use the stability parameter (0-1) to control consistency versus expressiveness, similarity_boost to match the original voice character, and style to exaggerate vocal style. Lower stability creates more expressive output.

faq.question: What audio formats are supported?
faq.answer: Output formats include MP3 at various bitrates (128kbps default, 192kbps high quality) and raw PCM at sample rates from 16kHz to 44.1kHz. Choose based on your quality and file size needs.

faq.question: Can I use this skill in multiple languages?
faq.answer: Yes, the eleven_multilingual_v2 model supports 32 languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi, and Russian with native-quality pronunciation.

faq.question: How do I combine voiceover with video generation?
faq.answer: First generate the voiceover audio using this skill, then use the audio URL from the response as input to video generation skills like bytedance/omnihuman-1-5 for talking head videos.
